title: FactoryLM CLF Corpus Source + Rights Manifest v1
description: A registered corpus source. Rights FAIL CLOSED: any consumer treats a missing/unknown right as false (see data-rights-and-leakage.md). document_lineage_key is the split key — all revisions/renders/crops/augmentations of the same lineage share it and must never cross train/val/test.

document_lineage_key.description: SPLIT KEY. Stable across all revisions/renders/crops/augmentations of the same source lineage. Leakage guard partitions on THIS, never on page or render.

supersedes.description: source_id of a prior revision this replaces

rights.description: FAIL CLOSED. rights_resolved=false OR any flag absent => treat as false. Only an explicit true grants the capability.

rights_resolved.description: false => unknown => deny all discretionary capabilities

evaluation_allowed.description: true only when the source policy explicitly permits evaluation

policy_ref.description: citation for the rights decision (license url / permission record id)

ingested_at.description: RFC3339 (stamped by caller; no wall-clock in pure builders)
